title: Auto-UpAi-Pipeline not accessible from PwShGUI-Help-Index.html sidebar
description: PwShGUI-Help-Index.html sidebar had no link to the Auto-UpAi-Pipeline tab. The pipeline tab only existed inside PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml but was not directly navigable from the Help Index. Additionally, PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml had no hash-based tab activation, so deep-linking to #auto-pipeline was impossible.
resolution: Added 'Auto-UpAi-Pipeline' sidebar link to PwShGUI-Help-Index.html pointing to PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml#auto-pipeline. Added hash-based tab activation IIFE to PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml that reads location.hash on page load and calls showTab() for the matching tab.
detection_method: User-reported broken feature, confirmed by sidebar menu audit
